Name: Game-Theoretic Expert Selection with Adversarial Robustness
Title: Nash Equilibrium Routing Strategies for Mixture-of-Experts under Adversarial Uncertainty
Experiment: Implement and analyze game-theoretic routing strategies using Tsallis entropy regularization. Compare with softmax and sparsemax under adversarial perturbations.
Description: Model expert selection as a two-player zero-sum game between a Selector maximizing utility and adversarial Nature introducing worst-case perturbations. Derive Nash equilibrium strategies with endogenous Tsallis entropy regularization.
